title: Mount Davidson Has SF's Highest View, and Edgehill One Of Its Best
content: # Mount Davidson Will Give You SF’s Highest View, and Edgehill Mountain One of Its Best. You’ve seen Davidson’s cross, and its 928-foot elevation is also a workout. * Email a link to a friend (Opens in new window) Email. * Share on LinkedIn (Opens in new window) LinkedIn. From Mt. Davidson’s exposed eastern side, the view of Mt. Sutro and Twin Peaks makes comparisons hard to avoid. You’ve probably seen the cross poking out from Mount Davidson’s green canopy, but unless you live nearby, you might not have checked it out up close. The green space of the mountain is compact, about 40 acres, but with 400 feet of elevation gain, tightly wound trails, quaint rock walls and staircases, and plenty of spurs and odd corners to explore, you could easily spend a morning or afternoon up there. From Mount Davidson, head north, cross Portola Drive on the pedestrian bridge (please!), and make your way to Edgehill Mountain’s hard-to-find open space.

title: Edgehill Mountain - Wikipedia
content: Edgehill Mountain is one of the 46 hills of the City and County of San Francisco, California, located in the United States of America.
